title: Which Companies Are Hiring AI Engineers Right Now? (Live ATS Data)
description: 98 open AI engineer roles across 12 companies, live-scraped 2026-07-12: top employers, 31% remote share, posting dates.
answer_first: As of a July 12, 2026 scrape of live company job boards, there are 98 open AI engineer roles across 12 companies. Databricks leads the field with 33 openings, and 31% of all listed roles are marked remote. This is the first snapshot of this dataset, captured 2026-07-12, with 98 roles in the opening baseline. The table below lists every role with company, title, location, remote status, and posting date.

facts: Total live openings in this capture: 98 AI engineer roles from 12 companies (fetched 2026-07-12).
Databricks is the largest hirer with 33 open roles; Anthropic follows with 31.
30 of 98 roles (31%) are listed as remote-eligible.
The most common location is San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY, attached to 8 of the openings.
11 of the roles were posted within the 7 days before the fetch date.
First snapshot recorded 2026-07-12: a baseline of 98 open roles.

faq.q: How was this job data collected?
faq.a: It comes from one automated scrape of public company careers boards (Greenhouse, Lever, and Ashby style ATS pages) on 2026-07-12, matching roles for the query 'AI engineer'. The run returned 98 open roles across 12 companies, and every row keeps the posting date shown by the employer.

faq.q: Which company has the most open AI engineer roles?
faq.a: Databricks leads with 33 of the 98 openings in this capture, followed by Anthropic with 31. Hiring volume shifts week to week, so the leader can change between refreshes.

faq.q: How many of these roles are remote?
faq.a: 30 of the 98 roles (31%) are flagged remote by the employer's own listing. The Remote column in the table shows the flag for every individual role.

It reflects a 2026-07-12 capture of live boards; 11 of the roles were posted in the 7 days before the fetch. The page refreshes on the same URL and reports what opened and closed since the prior snapshot.

related_product.name: Company Careers Job Scraper (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby)
